title: ossea interior
intro: Ossea interior, also known as Ostea, is a type of plant-based supplement that is often marketed as a bone health support. It is typically derived from the inner shell of oyster shells and is rich in calcium, magnesium, and other minerals. Research suggests that ossea interior may have medicinal properties, including the ability to support bone health, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. Ossea interior can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and powders, which can be used to support overall bone health and well-being.
